name: Broccoli Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli according to the instructions on the box and drain well.
2. In a bowl, mix together all ingredients except cornbread stuffing and 1/2 stick of butter. Pour into a greased round casserole dish.
3. Top with cornbread stuffing mix and 1/2 stick of butter sliced thin.
4. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes. If you are transporting this dish, cook it for only 30 minutes at home and bake for the remaining 15 minutes just before serving to keep it moist.
